trivia_bullets.text: Deafening Silence belongs to the white-aligned Ardenvale court in Throne of Eldraine, whose identity centers on oaths, knighthood, and religious order.

Flavor text: 'They have forsaken their vows. The edict of the Circle demands their voices be silenced.' —Syr Tasdale, knight of Ardenvale. The Circle is Ardenvale's governing religious body; Syr Tasdale also appears in Revenge of Ravens (ELD 104) flavor text.
Sideboard mainstay in Modern, Pioneer, and Legacy as storm-hate. Received a Special Guests Showcase reprint (no. 120) in August 2025, indicating sustained competitive relevance.
Artist Igor Kieryluk. Three stitched-shut mouths in triptych composition directly mirrors the enchantment's mechanical forced-silence effect on all players.
Four total printings: ELD (2019), Secret Lair Drop (2023), Mystery Booster 2 (2024), Special Guests (2025).

related_cards.name: Revenge of Ravens
related_cards.note: Syr Tasdale named in both cards' flavor texts — flavor-linked Ardenvale story arc

related_cards.name: Ardenvale Tactician
related_cards.note: Same Ardenvale court affiliation, flavor-cycle neighbor

related_cards.name: Silence
